outputs.description: URL on which the model ran. DBotPredictURLPhishing.FinalVerdict Final verdict of the URL.
outputs.name: DBotPredictURLPhishing.URL

outputs.description: DBotPredictURLPhishing.UseOfSuspiciousLogo Whether a logo (from our list of top most use company for phishing) has been fraudulently used. Our predefined list of logos is: Paypal, Instagram, Gmail, Outlook, Linkedin, Facebook, Ebay, amazon, Google, Microsoft. DBotPredictURLPhishing.HasLoginForm
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: DBotPredictURLPhishing.URLStaticScore Probability for the URL to be malicious based only on the URL syntax. DBotPredictURLPhishing.BadSEOQuality
outputs.name: Whether there is a login form in the HTML. Usually phishing attacks aim to steal credentials from the victim and attackers using login forms to retrieve this information.

outputs.description: DBotPredictURLPhishing.NewDomain Whether the domain is younger than 6 months. New domains tend to be malicious. DBotPredictURLPhishing.TopMajesticDomain
outputs.name: Whether the domain has a good search engine optimization. Malicious domains tend to have a poor SEO.
Whether the domain belongs to the top Majestic domain list. If it does, we will always consider this domain as benign.
